prompts.title: Landing Narrative
prompts.purpose: Keep the public landing emotionally charged while staying aligned to the current governance version and release truth.

prompts.title: Role System
prompts.purpose: Define how agents balance contract discipline, creative exploration, and operator sovereignty across docs updates.

prompts.title: Visual Direction
prompts.purpose: Push the landing into a mission-control visual posture with rich but bounded animation and readable system hierarchy.

prompts.title: Release Reflection
prompts.purpose: Generate version-close reasoning, residual risks, and next-version pressure without softening governance boundaries.

prompts.title: Mission Control Experience
prompts.purpose: Keep the landing behaving like an operator console rather than a glossy showcase while preserving experimental motion.

prompts.title: Cognitive Debt Analyst
prompts.purpose: Translate hallucination and reasoning risk into enterprise-readable debt language with explicit decisions and mitigations.

prompts.title: Specialist MCP Composer
prompts.purpose: Describe which specialist MCP capability should be composed for a service or tier without centralizing runtime implementation.

prompts.title: Solution Packaging Narrative
prompts.purpose: Explain the SaaS tiers as operating commitments with distinct receipts, handoff rules, and customer expectations.
